para_trans: GOVERNMENT ORDER NUMBER: USP-1325 / Q.No.102 / PRASH-1
Madam Cama Marg, Martyrdom Rajguru Chowk,
Reference: - GOVERNMENT ORDER NUMBER: USP 1325 / Q.No.102 / PROSH-1, D. 13.03.2026
By order under reference, Mr. Chetan Balasaheb Nikam, Deputy Secretary, General, Home Department
The post was transferred to the administration department.
2. Now, under this order, Mr. Chetan Balasaheb Nikam, Deputy Secretary, General, Home Department
The transfer to the Administrative Department is being cancelled on administrative grounds.
This Government Order is available on the Government of Maharashtra website www.maharashtra.gov.in.
